items.caption: A side-by-side comparison of a woman's face with her'mathematically perfect' version, as determined by a computer scan. the woman on the left is smiling and appears to be in a casual setting, while the image on the right shows a digital representation of her face with a detailed facial scan overlay, highlighting the symmetry and proportions of the marquardt mask. the overlay includes text and lines that indicate the mathematical calculations used to create the 'perfect' version.
